evidence: Model uses table OnModify trigger; gold writes Evaluation in page Step 4 workflow.
justification: Earliest violation is L3 because persistence is attached to the wrong trigger/workflow hook.

evidence: Cost adjustment call executes before undo-transfer processing instead of after.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because the business-step sequence is incorrect.

evidence: Adjustment logic is gated by revaluation existence, skipping required correction path.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because conditional business logic is narrowed incorrectly.

evidence: Build fails with AL0110 orphaned ELSE syntax error.
justification: Earliest violation is L1 because compilation fails from invalid control-flow syntax.

evidence: Header-level location filtering excludes receipt lines with different line locations.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because filtering logic is applied at the wrong business scope.

evidence: Preview posting filters by Item No. only, omitting full page context.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because required business-context filters are incomplete.

evidence: Qty. to Invoice TestField validation is removed from item charge assignment.
justification: Earliest violation is L2 because a required validation contract at execution time was removed.

evidence: Qty. to Invoice validation is conditioned on Remainder instead of Blank semantics.
justification: Earliest violation is L2 because validation execution conditions are implemented incorrectly.

evidence: Qty. to Invoice check is moved out of OnValidate into later processing.
justification: Earliest violation is L3 because logic is placed in the wrong trigger-driven lifecycle point.

evidence: Fallback runs after item-cost retrieval instead of during BOM-tree calculation.
justification: Earliest violation is L3 because behavior is hooked at the wrong processing event timing.

evidence: Reserve=Never filtering is deferred to post-processing, not source-level filtering.
justification: Earliest violation is L3 because filtering is shifted from the intended source-stage hook.

evidence: Fix only handles multi-ILE lot cases; required three-line scenario remains uncovered.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because branch coverage of the business workflow is incomplete.

evidence: Only Begin-Total is excluded; other system task types still inherit customer fields.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because task-type branching rules are incomplete.

evidence: WorkDate fallback is not properly gated by uninitialized Today state.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because fallback branching logic is incorrect.

evidence: Document Amount accepts four decimals beyond intended precision behavior.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because numeric precision business rules are violated.

evidence: Removing AutoFormatExpression causes Document Amount to ignore currency precision.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because currency-format business logic is broken.

evidence: Collection logic excludes non-Direct Posting G/L accounts from amount calculation.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because account-scope business rules are narrowed incorrectly.

evidence: Sibling journal lines are not consistently constrained to one Incoming Document Entry No.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because cross-line business consistency enforcement is incomplete.

evidence: Zero values are classified as debit instead of neutral in split logic.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because debit/credit branching behavior is wrong.

evidence: Split correction applies to Net Change only, omitting Balance fields.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because rule application scope is incomplete.

evidence: OnValidate comparison change omits opposite-side zero reset, leaving inconsistent values.
justification: Earliest violation is L2 because field-validation execution contract is violated.

evidence: Whitespace-only descriptions are not normalized to empty before skip logging.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because preprocessing and skip-logging workflow logic is incomplete.

evidence: Flow exits early for empty descriptions instead of continuing export processing.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because control-flow behavior in the business process is wrong.

evidence: Empty-description validation is moved to product creation, missing report-stage enforcement.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because validation is placed in the wrong business step.

evidence: 100% non-deductible VAT path is excluded from full non-deductible treatment.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because threshold branching for VAT logic is incorrect.

evidence: VAT Country/Region Code is assigned directly instead of using Validate.
justification: Earliest violation is L2 because validation-triggered propagation is bypassed at execution.

evidence: Bill-to VAT registration fallback runs only when Ship-to country is set.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because fallback condition logic is overly restrictive.

evidence: BOM Quantity Per of 0.005 is rounded to zero, losing valid precision.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because quantity precision business rules are violated.

evidence: Blank attribute values are not gated before mapping insertion.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because required conditional business guard is missing.

evidence: Component Expected Quantity is not scaled by finished-good sales quantity.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because quantity-scaling business logic is incorrect.

evidence: Fractional BOM consumption case miscomputes Quantity per and Expected Quantity relation.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because fractional-quantity business calculations are wrong.

evidence: Non-reservable rule is applied beyond Non-Inventory item scope.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because item-type scope logic is incorrect.

evidence: Non-reservable rule is applied beyond Service item scope.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because item-type scope logic is incorrect.

evidence: Automatic reservations are created for multiple lines, not only Reserve=Always items.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because per-line reservation branching is incorrect.

evidence: Next Task Date drilldown still applies an unintended System Task Type filter.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because query/filter business behavior is wrong.

evidence: Reservation blocking runs even when transfer quantity is not positive.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because quantity-condition workflow gating is incorrect.

evidence: Reservation blocking is not restricted to outbound Qty. to Ship > 0.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because outbound-only condition logic is missing.

evidence: Dimension import is limited incorrectly to G/L Account destination lines.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because destination-type business scope is narrowed incorrectly.

evidence: Non-deductible VAT is added without requiring a non-empty Job currency code.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because currency-dependent posting logic is applied unconditionally.

evidence: Journal template-name check bypass is widened beyond the Vendor-only exception.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because account-type branching in settlement validation is incorrect.

evidence: Vendor Name population is not restricted to Vendor plus Invoice documents.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because compound condition business logic is wrong.

evidence: Currency conversion is applied to Unit Cost instead of Unit Price only.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because field-target business logic for conversion is incorrect.

evidence: Bill-to Customer No. is not copied when source value is empty.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because copy-step business behavior is overly conditional.

evidence: Export is skipped when third-party location equals default fulfillment service.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because the export eligibility branch is incorrect.
